div.div: On the first day of the month system should automatically create an accounting period

div.div:
System should generate new accounting period's name with the following format: ACCOUNTING-Current year-Current month
For example: ACCOUNTING202311

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));

rect.style: fill: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 478px; height: 1px; padding-top: 210px; margin-left: 771px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: "Helvetica"; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
System should set accounting period's dates automatically with the following logic:
Start date: first dat of the month
End date: last day of the month
Format of the dates:
Start date: 01.11.2023 00:00
End date: 30.11.2023 23:59

div.div:
System should set historical record in the History sub-object while creating a new accounting period:
01.11.2023 00:00 - Opened
